title: rubus × lanyii
intro: Rubus × lanyii, also known as the Lany's Bramble or Hybrid Raspberry, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a hybrid of the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the Himalayan raspberry (Rubus procerus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × lanyii lie in its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been found to have various health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × lanyii include its ability to protect against oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus × lanyii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
